candidate_answers.text: You’re all set. Feel free to reach out again if you need anything else.
The user's final message includes the stop marker after all requested cancellations and the upgrade have already been completed, so no further airline action is needed.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the final user stop turn after the cancellations and upgrade have already been confirmed complete, because stop is the only grounded remaining action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message including the stop marker
history_summary stops at the completed state and excludes any nonexistent future conversation
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
special case: mixed multi-reservation workflow is already complete before the selected turn
